title: Citrusy Gooey Fromage Frys Stir-fry
description: A low-carb solo-dinner Korean dish featuring citrusy and gooey textures from cheese and smoke infused into a flavorful stir-fry, perfect for those looking to enjoy a satisfying meal without the carbs.
instructions: Chop the Fromage Frys into small pieces and set aside. Dice the garlic and onion, slice the bell pepper, and break the broccoli florets.
In a bowl, mix together the chopped Fromage Frys, diced garlic, onions, salt, white pepper powder, soy sauce, ginger paste, and citrus zest (if using). Toss well to coat evenly.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the vegetables and cook until they start to soften and release moisture.

Pour in the Fromage Frys mixture and stir to combine with all other ingredients. Reduce heat to low, cover with a lid if available, and let it simmer for about 5-7 minutes until the cheese starts to melt and become gooey. You can also add smoke flavor during this time or after.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish that has been greased lightly with oil. Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
Serve hot as a main course with your preferred side dishes.
